feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: 3 Decimal places for Data Migration in S4 Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi ALL,

Currently, we are implementing Country Oman - facing an issue with the Data Migration open item as templates allow only 2 decimal places. 

How to change default decimal places in the migration cockpit, I tried with modeler but cannot edit the standard structure.

entry.title: How to Integrate two different Custom Api in eclipse?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I want to use Custom API : I_BusinessPartnerTP_3 / I_CRDTMBUSINESSPARTNERTP to create Business Partner and Credit Data.

How to build classes to integrate them in eclipse? 

When I update CreditLimitAmount Field, I want to get the information that CreditSegment was created.

If it wasn't created, I should use Create CreditSegment Field first.

Best regards,

Eric

entry.title: renumber gl accounts
entry.content:
We are helping customer to migrate system to S4HC public edition. However, customer has own set of CoA, number range and account group requirements. Since public edition has predefined the chart of accounts and account group assignment, can experts recommend which approach is better in this situation? What is the pros and cons? Any other workaround that can minimize the maintenance effort?

1. disable all predefined GL accounts and renumber them to new accounts

2. create a new set of CoA as alternative CoA

entry.title: g/l account field enquiry
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We are planning to renumber the g/l accounts. But our customer required a reference field to store the previous g/l numbers for reference. Does s4hana cloud public edition have a standard reference field for us to use? Or we need to create custom field?

entry.title: how to handle too much output template requirement in Cloud
entry.content:
This is a consulting requestion, the customer requirement: The customer's sales order output template need based on their different customers' need. This will cause almost 100 sales order template need be create. As there is only tool Adobe live designer could be use in Cloud to change the standard template, it will cause too much time and efforts. 

Is there any other workaround could be adopt?

entry.title: Transfer Stock - In-Plant
entry.content:
To perform the "Transfer Stock - In-Plant" function for inventory transfer.
Which API should I use and which feature should I add in the Communication Arrangements?

entry.title: Select ship to party in outbound delivery creation in subcontracting process
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have the following case:

In the subcontracting process, the supplier have different locations to perform the assembly. 

The supplier of the subcontracting process have assigned a customer with different ship to party partner functions. Each of ship to party customer corresponds to one of the supplier locations.

When we create the outbound delivery to send the components to the supplier, the outbound delivery is created with the customer associated to the supplier as a SHIP TO PARTY of the outbound delivery created.

We want to select the ship to party when we create the outbound delivery to assign the correct delivery address in the outbound delivery.

How can we do it?

Is it possible to do what we need to do in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

 

Thanks for the support.

 

Best regards

entry.title: Net due date calculation with Working Days only
entry.content:
We need to calculate the Net due date according to payment terms with skipping the non-working days (like Saturday / Sunday).

In short system should consider only working days during calculation of Net due date.

In Sap generally system calculate all days but we need to Skip the Saturday, Sunday & non working days during calculation of Net Due Date.

We did not find BADI or Public Cloud SAP Notes that could be used in an extensibility to meet this requirement.

Please, could you please guide in this regard, since i went through the many thread but there were not any concrete resolution on it.

entry.title: Transfer of Balance from a Supplier Reconciliation Account to a Non-reconciliation account
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

During the data migration, all 'due to' intercompany transactions were posted to a supplier reconciliation account (21300000). The user now wants to transfer this balance to a non-reconciliation account (21310004). Since direct postings to a reconciliation account are not permitted, we need to find the best practice for handling this situation.

I attempted to create a supplier with reconciliation account 21300000 and posted a credit memo to achieve the required journal entry. However, I am uncertain if this is the correct approach. Any feedback or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks & Regards,

Rishav.

entry.title: SAP Signavio Process Insights for S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Signavio experts,

Does SAP Signavio Process Insights currently support S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition as a source system for ERP data? If not, are there any plans to support this in the future?

Best regards,
Kaiwen

SAP Signavio Process Insights

entry.title: Create Standard Business Partner from Custom RAP Application for Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
I have Created a Custom RAP application in HANA Public Cloud.

I have a Custom table ZPATIENT_REG it has a field Patient_Id (Char 10), name and other Customer related informations. Image is attached for further clarification. Now I want to create a Standard BusinessPartner from Patient_Id. I can't create it with CL_MD_BP_MAINTAIN because it is not whitelisted.

My Questions:

1. How can I create Business Partner from Patient_Id in my Custom RAP Behavior Implementation in S4HC Public.

2. If there is any other way to achieve this guide me on that.

Thanks & Regards

Rajib

entry.title: How to use flavours in different App?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,


I have build a flavour in CS01 (Create BOM) i wnat to replicate same in CS02( Change BOM) and CS03(Display BOM) 
Could you please help on how can i achive this.

 

 

Thanks and regards
Sunil Kumar Padhy

entry.title: No sale pages en el home de S4hana cloud public edition
entry.content:
Hola.

Si no te aparecen las en pages en S/4hana cloud public edition, la solución es habilitar los intereses, para que te aparezcan en el home.

entry.title: How to maintain multiple Payment Methods in Business Partner?
entry.content:
In Fiori App "Manage Business Partner Master data" it is not possible to select more than one Payment method. In "old" app "Maintain Business Partner", it is possible. 

Can anyone explain why this is not possible in the new app?

entry.title: Approval of purchase requisition failed. Contact admin. Message no. MMPUR_PR_WFL_COMMON008
entry.content:
Hello everyone 


I have an issue while trying to convert PR to PO , PR has been released but the staus of the document still 03 in release and when i checked workflow status app  for overall release of purchase requisition i found 3 errors

1- 

Approval of purchase requisition failed. Contact admin.

Message no. MMPUR_PR_WFL_COMMON008
2- 

Authorization missing for <POrg> ; contact administrator

Message no. MMPUR_REQ_COMMON097
3- 

An exception was raised

Message no. SY530

but i checked another PR with the same criteria but it has a staus released completed and already converted to po without any problem
can anyone explain how to solve this issue 
thanks

entry.title: cl_attachment_service_api usage in S/4HANA Cloud Public - Guidance Needed
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

I'm new to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and I'm currently learning how to handle attachments using the ABAP cl_attachment_service_api local API. I'm having trouble with basic operations like creating and deleting attachments, and I'm not sure how to make the attachments appear in the "Manage Documents" app.

Any guidance or code examples would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Transfer Stock - In-Plant
entry.content: I would like to know which API to call and which communication scenario to configure in the 'Communication Arrangements' so I can retrieve the results shown in the attached image. I used 'API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV,' but the results I found seem different.

entry.title: Transfer stock error
entry.content:
I want to transfer Unrestricted-Use Stock from GS01 to Blocked Stock at GS02. When using the following field values, I received the error message:"Deficit of SL Stck.in qual.insp 1 PC : MPD241204BK24 GS00 GS01"
Here is my post body

{
    "PostingDate": "2024-09-05T00:00:00",
    "GoodsMovementCode": "04",  // Transfer Posting
    "to_MaterialDocumentItem": [
        {
            "Plant": "GS00",
            "StorageLocation": "GS01",
            "InventoryStockType": "01",
            "Material": "MPD241204BK24",
            "GoodsMovementType": "321",
            "QuantityInEntryUnit": "1",
            "IssuingOrReceivingPlant": "GS00",
            "IssuingOrReceivingStorageLoc": "GS02",
            "IssuingOrReceivingStockType": "03"
        }
    ]
}
How should I adjust the field values?

entry.title: Sales Invoices for Export sales with payment of IGST and without payment of IGST tax
entry.content:
Hi Experts and Friends,

 

Kindly guide wherein the below case for export sale invoices there should be a checkbox or custom field for the application of IGST on the export sale invoice. That checkbox decides whether the IGST will be applied in the invoice or not.

In case of Export Sale Invoices do we have condition or tax code wherein IGST get posted and reversed to a different account simultaneously.

For Example,

With payment of IGST

Export Sale Invoice is $1000 and the IGST is $180,

In this case the total invoice pricing should include the IGST of $180 for which the journal entry will be;

Receivable Foreign              Dr.  $1180

    To Revenue                      Cr.             $1000

    To IGST-Output                Cr.             $180

Then, simultaneously another entry is posted in the background as below;

IGST-Output                           Dr.   $180

   To IGST Receivable             Cr.            $180

The said IGST receivable is then received as form of duty drawback months later when the payment is completed.

 

And the other condition being the exclusion of IGST totally, in which case the entry will be;

Receivable Foreign              Dr.  $1000

    To Revenue                      Cr.             $1000

 

If there is some solution or workaround to the above case any suggestion is greatly helpful.

 

Thanks

Bhavesh

entry.title: Custom Field on GST Statutory reports - India
entry.content:
Hi Experts and Friends,

 

Can anyone guide me if we can add the invoice level custom fields on the GST Statutory Reports - India.

If it possible any configurations or activations are to be done do suggest.

 

Thanks

Bhavesh
